payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Vertical gold-toned picture frame with a beige/cream mat surrounding a printed document or certificate behind glass; the rectangular frame is intact, wall-mounted and fully visible in the crop, estimated distance ~1.5 meters from the camera.
